since_last: 44% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.52%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.12% · BTC -0.80% · Gold +2.30% · Nasdaq100 -0.04%. 44% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.52%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.52%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +24.19%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +24.19%, DELL +9.42%, CBRS +5.30%, AVAV +4.64%, HPE +4.47%. Laggards: PATH -11.67%, GEV -7.30%, NOW -5.03%, WDAY -4.48%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.87% at $124.62
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
